metadata.description: Operating systems and skills for product, operations, and AI-forward leaders. Built by Blane Warrene.

plugins.name: product-in-acquisitions-os
plugins.description: An operating system for product leaders accountable for post-acquisition integration outcomes. Walks acquiring-company product leaders through the 90-day framework: Week 0 readiness, roadmap convergence, market positioning stability, and people integration.

plugins.name: job-interview-meeting-preparation
plugins.description: Prepare a candidate, advisor, or operator for a high-stakes professional meeting. Researches the company and stakeholder, synthesizes the strategic picture, and produces two deliverables: a detailed in-conversation brief and a printable one-pager rendered to HTML and PDF. Covers four meeting types: interview (default), advisory or consulting, partnership or BD, and sales discovery.
